mapper.select: select user_id, avatar_url, nickname, gender, grade, college, major, interest_tags, bio, real_name, verified, verify_status from user_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select count(1) from auth_center_record where user_id = #{userId} and auth_type = 'campus' and status = 'pending'
mapper.insert: insert into auth_center_record (user_id, auth_type, school, student_no, real_name, identity_type, phone, material_name, material_url, status, feedback, action_text, submitted_at) values (#{userId}, #{authType}, #{school}, #{studentNo}, #{realName}, #{identityType}, #{phone}, #{materialName}, #{materialUrl}, #{status}, #{feedback}, #{actionText}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.select: select record_id, user_id, auth_type, school, student_no, real_name, identity_type, phone, material_name, material_url, status, feedback, action_text, submitted_at, reviewed_at from auth_center_record where user_id = #{userId} order by submitted_at desc, record_id desc
select label, icon_key as icon from auth_center_benefit where enabled = 1 order by sort_weight, benefit_id
select label, tone from auth_center_material_sample where enabled = 1 order by sort_weight, sample_id
select title, description, icon_key as icon from auth_center_right where enabled = 1 order by sort_weight, right_id
mapper.insert: insert into auth_center_phone_code (user_id, phone, code, used, expires_at) values (#{userId}, #{phone}, #{code}, #{used}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: select code_id, user_id, phone, code, used, expires_at from auth_center_phone_code where user_id = #{userId} and phone = #{phone} and used = 0 and expires_at >= #{now} order by code_id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update auth_center_phone_code set used = 1 where code_id = #{codeId} and used = 0
